description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a slanted, split lid made of what appears to be galvanized steel. The body of the dumpster is painted a muted green, with some surface irregularities and subtle weathering, suggesting outdoor use. The lid is textured with parallel grooves and appears to be made of a different, more reflective metal than the body. There are two horizontal slots or indentations on the front, likely for lifting or mechanical handling, but no visible handles or wheels. The sides are plain, and the rear is featureless, with the lid overhanging slightly. The overall construction is robust, suitable for heavy-duty waste collection in urban environments.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a slanted, grooved split lid and a sturdy, industrial appearance. The body is weathered and plain, with no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the slanted lid and the green, slightly textured body, with two horizontal slots visible.
description_view_1: The top view highlights the split, grooved metal lid and the rectangular shape of the dumpster.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slanted lid and plain green body with subtle surface details.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a flat, featureless green surface with the overhanging lid visible at the top.
attribute_lid_type: split, slanted, grooved metal lid with two sections; no visible locking or opening mechanisms
